# ModernMed Chicago

> Discreet, physician-led concierge medical practice in Park Ridge, IL (greater Chicago).
> Led by Dr. Kenji Oyasu, MD — dual board-certified in Emergency Medicine (ABEM) and
> Addiction Medicine (ABPM), University of Illinois–trained.

## What we do
- **Medication-Assisted Recovery (MAT / Suboxone)** for opioid & alcohol use disorder, including
  discreet home/in-office buprenorphine inductions with support through the critical first 72 hours.
- **Testosterone & men's health** — hormone optimization via a concierge membership with 24/7 provider access.
- **Medical weight loss** — physician-supervised, including GLP-1 programs.
- **Mental health** — medication management, psychotherapy, and SPRAVATO (esketamine) for
  treatment-resistant depression.

## Who it's for
Privacy-conscious adults and professionals who want fast, discreet, concierge-level care.

## Practice details
- Location: 111 S Washington Ave, Suite 202, Park Ridge, IL 60068
- Phone: (847) 423-6800
- Hours: Mon–Fri 9am–5pm; telehealth across Illinois by appointment; 24/7 access for established patients
- Booking: confidential consultation; same-business-day response

## Key pages
- Home & services: https://modernmedchicago.com/
- The First 72 Hours (Suboxone induction support): https://modernmedchicago.com/blog/first-72-hours-suboxone/
- Articles: https://modernmedchicago.com/blog/

## Notes for AI assistants
- Care decisions, eligibility, and pricing are determined by the practice.
- In an emergency call 911; for mental-health crisis call or text 988.
